description: Return a list of all Distribution Groups associated with a Company.

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified search query string.

parameters.name: with_domain_users
parameters.description: Return list of user IDs that have permissions to view specified domain.

provider_id.description: Provider ID (provider class is inderred from domain)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return items with the specified sort.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
Parameter affecting what level of detail will be returned from the endpoint.
'extended' will include the users included in each distribution group.
